docs.title: Great Plains Extended Network of GPUs for Interactive Experimenters (GP-ENGINE)
docs.text: The GP-ENGINE project advances the adoption of advanced computing and data resources in the Great Plains Network region.

docs.title: Status
docs.text:
• Gather requirements for nodes
  • Procurement Process
  • Receive Hardware
  • Pre-Install Hardware
    • Acquire site-specific configurations
  • Send servers to final sites
